rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex syntax without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
generic_rules: Place guarantees in the appropriate annex scope based on the visibility of referenced features
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for const and eq declarations
Remove guarantees with unresolved references or invalid types instead of adding architecture
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level references in component type annexes
Do not use subcomponent paths in component type contracts
